visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on the face of a man sitting in the driver's seat of a car at night. He has a serious and intense expression, looking slightly off-camera. The lighting is dim, casting deep shadows on his face. In the blurred background, another person is visible but out of focus. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the top left corner of the frame. The camera remains static, holding the tight focus on the man's contemplative face. The audio is dominated by a powerful and dramatic orchestral score. It begins with a deep, resonant, and suspenseful bass note that creates a sense of immense weight and anticipation. This quickly swells into a high-energy, fast-paced, and intense musical piece, full of driving percussion and soaring, urgent melodies. The music has a cinematic and action-packed quality, building a feeling of high stakes and imminent action. There is no dialogue or other sound effects present.

The camera cuts to a wide, side-view shot of a black sedan parked on a city street at night. The car is positioned in front of a building with illuminated signs, one of which reads "CASHMERE FASHION." The man from the previous shot is visible in the driver's seat
